title: code-coverage skill persistence state
description: Schema dei file persisti in .code-coverage/ durante session. Gli artefatti dal naming *.json seguono i contratti dei rispettivi script Python; gli artefatti *.txt/*.log sono testuali per audit trail.

stack.json.description: Output di detect_stack.py — invalidato da package.json/pom.xml/Cargo.toml/pyproject.toml/build.gradle/pubspec.yaml/go.mod mtime. Field `pre_existing_coverage_pct` deriva da GitHub repository variable TEST_COVERAGE_PERCENTAGE (var assente → 0.0); `pre_existing_coverage_source` ∈ {github_variable, missing}.

pre_existing_branch_pct.description: Branch coverage pre-esistente da coverage-summary.json (formato V8/Istanbul). 0.0 se non disponibile.

line_branch_delta.description: Differenza pre_existing_coverage_pct - pre_existing_branch_pct. null se branch non disponibile (V8 branches.pct=0 o summary assente).

size.json.description: Output di estimate_size.py --file-list — invalidato dallo stesso pinnacle file di stack.json

env.json.description: Output di validate_env.py — invalidato dallo stesso pinnacle file di stack.json

coverage-summary.json.ref: framework-specific format (vitest/jest json-summary, jacoco xml-to-json, etc.)

failures.json.description: Output di categorize_failure.py per Phase 7 — TTL per-iter

deferred_files.json.description: File deferred-by-design da Phase 5 (P2/P3 hit precoce) — escluso da Phase 6→7 gate

generation-plan.txt.description: Lista files da generare in Phase 5 (audit trail)

decisions.log.description: Log centralizzato decisioni autonome (audit trail). Scritto da log_decision() in cache-helper.sh.

jest-compat.json.description: Output di detect_jest_incompat.py (Phase 1 parallel). Per-workspace Vitest/Jest compatibility verdict. Decision values: vitest-default | vitest-migrate | jest-incompat | jest-forced. Invalidato dallo stesso pinnacle di stack.json.
jest-compat.json.ref: scripts/detect_jest_incompat.py output contract; assets/vitest-jest-compat.json closed signal list I1..I10

strategy.json.description: Phase 2 output. Per-workspace framework + migrate flag. Triggers Phase 4b when any migrate=true.

migrate.description: If true, Phase 4b runs migrate_jest_to_vitest.py for this workspace

migration-report.json.description: Output di migrate_jest_to_vitest.py (Phase 4b). Per-workspace migration outcome.

migration-snapshot/.description: Rollback bundle (Phase 4b). Mirror of repo tree (relative paths) of touched files before migration: package.json, jest.config.*, jest.setup.*, lockfile, *.{test,spec}.*. Used by restore_snapshot() on verification failure.

overrides.json.description: User overrides (optional). Located in .code-coverage/overrides.json. Surfaces as signal I10 in detect_jest_incompat.

force_jest_reason.description: Required when force_jest=true. Without reason, override is ignored.

definitions.session: Una singola invocazione /code-coverage. Re-invocazione = nuova session = invalida tutto eccetto stack.json/size.json/env.json (mtime check vs pinnacle file).
